tools.description: Change the status of the document associated with a document version. Valid status values: ON_TRACK, AT_RISK, OFF_TRACK, COMPLETED. Use list_document_versions or search_documents to find the document version ID first.
tools.name: change_document_version_status
tools.title: Change Document Version Status

tools.description: Create a new ProductNow document and immediately begin AI generation. Use prompt for the short generation brief. Use context for any additional background, such as the full text of a plan file or notes from a prior conversation. If a template is requested, call search_templates first to get the templateVersionId.
tools.name: create_document
tools.title: Create Document

tools.description: Leave a comment on a document that is in review status. The comment is posted as the user's personal agent. Only works on review-status document versions. Use list_document_versions to find the correct documentVersionId first.
tools.name: create_document_comment
tools.title: Create Document Comment

tools.description: Create a new folder in ProductNow. Optionally nest it inside a parent folder. Returns the new folder's ID and name.
tools.name: create_folder
tools.title: Create Folder

tools.description: Create a brand new template in ProductNow. Returns the new template's ID, name, and metadata.
tools.name: create_template
tools.title: Create Template

tools.description: Add a note to a template version in ProductNow. Notes are used to track observations, feedback, or context about a template. Returns the new note's ID on success.
tools.name: create_template_note
tools.title: Create Template Note

tools.description: Add a new section to a template version in ProductNow. Each section has a title, instructions for the AI when generating that section, an optional display order, and an optional content type. Returns the new section's ID on success.
tools.name: create_template_section
tools.title: Create Template Section

tools.description: Permanently delete a template. This action cannot be undone. Requires MANAGE permission on the template.
tools.name: delete_template
tools.title: Delete Template

tools.description: Delete a section from a template version. This action cannot be undone. Requires EDIT permission on the parent template.
tools.name: delete_template_section
tools.title: Delete Template Section

tools.description: Edit a template's name. Omit name to leave it unchanged.
tools.name: edit_template
tools.title: Edit Template

tools.description: Edit an existing section within a template version in ProductNow. All fields are optional; only the fields provided will be updated. At least one field must be supplied. Returns the section's ID on success.
tools.name: edit_template_section
tools.title: Edit Template Section

tools.description: Replace the content of a template version by providing a new .templatepn JSON. First use get_template_content to retrieve the current content, modify it, then pass the updated JSON here.
tools.name: edit_template_version
tools.title: Edit Template Version

tools.description: Edit a template version's metadata, including description, creation guidelines, category, default length, and default effort. Include only the fields to change.
tools.name: edit_template_version_metadata
tools.title: Edit Template Version Metadata

tools.description: Retrieve a document attachment as a base64-encoded file with its MIME type and file name. Use this to read image or file attachments referenced in a document. Requires VIEW access to the document.
tools.name: get_attachment
tools.title: Get Attachment

tools.description: Retrieve the full content of a ProductNow document by its ID, optionally targeting a specific version via documentVersionId. Returns the document name, version ID and status, folder location, and all section content.
tools.name: get_document
tools.title: Get Document

tools.description: Fetch the current chat messages and edit mode for a document's AI draft chat. Returns the conversation history and whether the agent is in ask_before_edit or edit_automatically mode.
tools.name: get_document_chat
tools.title: Get Document Chat

tools.description: Retrieve all feedback submitted on a specific document version, returned as CSV. Columns include ID, Title, Description, Feedback, Feedback Type, and Created On.
tools.name: get_document_feedback
tools.title: Get Document Feedback

tools.description: Fetch all comment threads on a specific document version. Returns thread IDs, statuses, quoted text, and creation timestamps.
tools.name: get_document_threads
tools.title: Get Document Threads

tools.description: Retrieve the current status of the document associated with a document version. Returns the status value, dates, and active flag.
tools.name: get_document_version_status
tools.title: Get Document Version Status

tools.description: Fetch the current chat messages and edit mode for a template's AI chat. Returns the conversation history and whether the agent is in ask_before_edit or edit_automatically mode.
tools.name: get_template_chat
tools.title: Get Template Chat

tools.description: Get the full content of a template's latest version in .templatepn format. Returns a JSON string containing the template structure with all sections, instructions, and metadata.
tools.name: get_template_content
tools.title: Get Template Content

tools.description: Fetch all messages in a specific comment thread. Returns message IDs, content, author names, timestamps, and whether each message was posted by an AI agent.
tools.name: get_thread_messages
tools.title: Get Thread Messages

tools.description: List all versions of a document, optionally filtered by status. Returns version IDs, version numbers, statuses, and creation timestamps.
tools.name: list_document_versions
tools.title: List Document Versions

tools.description: List folders accessible to the current user, optionally filtered to a specific parent folder. Omit parentFolderId to list root-level folders.
tools.name: list_folders
tools.title: List Folders

tools.description: List all templates the user has access to. Optionally filter by access level or category. Returns template IDs, names, descriptions, categories, and whether the user can edit each template.
tools.name: list_templates
tools.title: List Templates

tools.description: Post a message to a document's AI draft chat to request edits or ask questions about the document. The message is sent to the draft agent, which can modify the document's content.
tools.name: post_document_chat_message
tools.title: Post Document Chat Message

tools.description: Post a message to a template's AI chat to request edits or ask questions about the template. The message is sent to the template agent, which can modify template sections and instructions.
tools.name: post_template_chat_message
tools.title: Post Template Chat Message

tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a specific comment thread message. Requires COMMENT permission on the document. Use get_thread_messages to find message IDs.
tools.name: react_to_message
tools.title: React To Message

tools.description: Reply to an existing comment thread on a document as the user's personal agent. Requires COMMENT permission on the document.
tools.name: reply_to_thread
tools.title: Reply To Thread

tools.description: Search for ProductNow documents by name. Returns a list of matching documents with their IDs and folder paths. Use this to find a document before calling get_document.
tools.name: search_documents
tools.title: Search Documents

tools.description: Search for ProductNow templates by name. Call this before create_document when a template is specified by name. Returns matches with templateVersionId values.
tools.name: search_templates
tools.title: Search Templates

tools.description: Switch the edit mode of a document's AI draft chat. ask_before_edit means the agent asks before making changes; edit_automatically lets the agent apply edits directly.
tools.name: switch_document_chat_edit_mode
tools.title: Switch Document Chat Edit Mode

tools.description: Switch the edit mode of a template's AI chat. ask_before_edit means the agent asks before making changes; edit_automatically lets the agent apply edits directly.
tools.name: switch_template_edit_mode
tools.title: Switch Template Edit Mode
